description: Search for or read a FHIR Media resource (photos, videos, or audio recordings acquired in healthcare, such as clinical or diagnostic imaging). For direct read, provide _id alone. Media references are often returned by DiagnosticReport; content.url points to a Binary resource holding the actual image or recording data.

searchParams._id: Media resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.based-on: ServiceRequest or CarePlan that caused this media to be created
searchParams.created: Date or date range when the media was collected
searchParams.operator: Who generated the image (Practitioner, Organization, CareTeam, Device, Patient, PractitionerRole, RelatedPerson)
searchParams.patient: Patient the media is a record of (Media.subject resolving to Patient)
searchParams.status: Status: preparation, in-progress, not-done, on-hold, stopped, completed, entered-in-error, unknown
searchParams.subject: Who/what the media is a record of (Patient, Practitioner, PractitionerRole, Group, Device, Specimen, Location)
searchParams.type: Classification of media: image, video, or audio (coded)
searchParams.view: Imaging view/projection, e.g. lateral or antero-posterior (coded)
